intended_use: Adravision Perio is a radiological semi-automated image processing software device intended to aid dental professionals in the measurements of mesial and distal bone levels associated with each tooth
intended_use_full: Adravision Perio is a radiological semi-automated image processing software device intended to aid dental professionals in the measurements of mesial and distal bone levels associated with each tooth from bitewing and periapical radiographs. It should not be used in-lieu of full patient evaluation or solely relied upon to make or confirm a diagnosis.
target_condition: Measurement of interproximal bone levels associated with teeth on bitewing and periapical radiographs
ground_truth: Object Key Similarity (OKS) Assessment using key points labeled by ground truthers; Length Measurement Assessment using consensus CAL length measurements labeled by three ground truthers
other_metrics: Precision: 91.0% (bitewing), 84.8% (periapical); Recall: 94.0% (bitewing), 89.3% (periapical); Mean Absolute Error: 0.434 mm (bitewing), 0.504 mm (periapical)
